scripts.deploy:development: dotnet lambda deploy-function --function-name Flyingdarts-Backend-Signalling-OnDefault-Development  -frun dotnet6 -f net6.0 --region eu-west-1
scripts.deploy:production: dotnet lambda deploy-function --function-name Flyingdarts-Backend-Signalling-OnDefault-Production  -frun dotnet6 -f net6.0 --region eu-west-1
